articles.title: Top 10 stocks rated ‘Buy’ this week: Brokerages project 14% to 68% returns
articles.description: Equity markets rebounded as crude oil prices dropped below $90, with Nifty 50 and Sensex gaining over 2% for the week; top brokerages recommend 10 stocks across sectors highlighting strong growth potential.

articles.title: Raghuram Rajan’s 2013 playbook: Why the RBI just pulled it out again
articles.description: Faced with rising crude oil prices and global volatility, the RBI's June 2026 policy framework avoids interest rate hikes. Instead, it deploys wide-ranging FCNR(B) deposit subsidies and ECB swap facilities to attract up to $65 billion in foreign inflows.

articles.title: US-Iran peace hopes spark market rally, indices surge 2%
articles.description: Indian stock markets surged more than 2% on Friday, driven by hopes of a diplomatic breakthrough between the US and Iran, which could end the conflict in West Asia. The rally was also supported by aggressive short covering, easing geopolitical concerns, a sharp decline in global crude oil prices, and a strong recovery in the […]

articles.title: Peacemeal Cheers Bulls: St Logs Biggest Gains in Over 2 Months
articles.description: Indias key equity indices surged over 2% on Friday, the most in two months, as the decline in oil prices amid fresh hopes of a peace deal between the US and Iran eased nervous investor sentiment.

articles.title: US stocks rise after oil prices ease and SpaceX soars in its debut on Wall Street
articles.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. stocks rose Friday after oil prices fell again, and SpaceX soared in its highly anticipated debut on Wall Street. The S&P 500 added 0.5%
